ddls:
CREATE TABLE "substance_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substance category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the substance category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the substance category */,
  "is_opioid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the substance is an opioid */,
  "common_use" TEXT /* Common uses of the substance */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the substance */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects of the substance */,
  "withdrawal_symptoms" TEXT /* Common withdrawal symptoms associated with the substance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substance_combinations" (
  "combination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substance combination */,
  "category1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first substance category in the combination */,
  "category2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second substance category in the combination */,
  "combination_name" TEXT /* Name of the substance combination */,
  "year_2007" INTEGER /* Number of overdose deaths in 2007 */,
  "year_2008" INTEGER /* Number of overdose deaths in 2008 */,
  "year_2009" INTEGER /* Number of overdose deaths in 2009 */,
  "year_2010" INTEGER /* Number of overdose deaths in 2010 */,
  "year_2011" INTEGER /* Number of overdose deaths in 2011 */,
  "year_2012" INTEGER /* Number of overdose deaths in 2012 */,
  "year_2013" INTEGER /* Number of overdose deaths in 2013 */,
  "year_2014" INTEGER /* Number of overdose deaths in 2014 */,
  "year_2015" INTEGER /* Number of overdose deaths in 2015 */,
  "year_2016" INTEGER /* Number of overdose deaths in 2016 */,
  "year_2017" INTEGER /* Number of overdose deaths in 2017 */,
  "percent_2017" REAL /* Percentage of unintentional drug overdose deaths in 2017 */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group */,
  "is_unintentional" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the overdose deaths are unintentional */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of overdose deaths */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("combination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_combinations_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_combinations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_combinations_category1_id FOREIGN KEY ("category1_id") REFERENCES substance_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_combinations_category2_id FOREIGN KEY ("category2_id") REFERENCES substance_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each substance category
Indicates whether the substance is an opioid
Common side effects of the substance
Common withdrawal symptoms associated with the substance
Unique identifier for each substance combination
ID of the first substance category in the combination
ID of the second substance category in the combination
Percentage of unintentional drug overdose deaths in 2017
Indicates whether the overdose deaths are unintentional
Timestamp of the last update to the record
Unique identifier for each demographic group
